chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 547 - وَ أَوْصَى أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنْ يُنْدَبَ فِي اَلْمَوَاسِمِ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.547 - Imam al-Baqir (as) willed that he be lamented (mourned) during special gatherings for ten years.
